riskFloorReasons: changes the signal that feeds an automatic token-burn throttle runbook
changes rolling share and rate calculations across all attribution keys

causalAutopsy.notes: The ledger correctly retained cache-read usage for observability, but BurnDetector reused the gross total for cost-shaped shares and rates. That collapsed cheap warm-cache reuse into fresh spend and could mis-rank sessions. The repair preserves gross totals and adds a separate fresh-cost aggregation consumed only by burn decisions.
